hero.subtitle: Two unique luxury apartments in the heart of Putney, London

about.title: A London stay unlike any other
about.description: Ziggla blends the sophistication of high-end hospitality with an avant-garde spirit. We believe your stay should be a curated canvas of memories, framed by bold design and effortless luxury in London's most charming neighbourhood.

amenities.title: Uncompromising Comfort
amenities.description: Every detail is designed to facilitate a seamless transition into the London lifestyle. From high-speed connectivity to boutique spa features.

location.title: In the heart of Putney
location.description: Perfectly positioned for both business and leisure, offering tranquility by the Thames with rapid connections to Central London.

booking.title: Ready to book your stay?
booking.subtitle: Select your dates to check availability at our Putney properties.
booking.datesUnavailable: These dates overlap an existing booking. Please pick others.

footer.tagline: Curating elevated living experiences in London's most desirable neighbourhoods. Luxury with personality.

newsletter.title: Join the Collective
newsletter.description: Exclusive offers and curated stays, delivered to your inbox.

bookingPage.title: Secure Your Stay
bookingPage.subtitle: Confirm your details and finalize your booking for a curated experience at the Gold Dust Loft.
bookingPage.specialRequestsPlaceholder: Any specific requirements or arrival notes...

bookingPage.paymentWillAppear: The secure card form will appear here after you confirm your details.
bookingPage.termsFooter: By clicking "Confirm & Pay Now", you agree to ZIGGLA's House Rules, Cancellation Policy, and Guest Refund Policy.
bookingPage.cancellationNote: Free cancellation until 48 hours before check-in. Full refund guaranteed.

confirmation.title: Booking Confirmed!
confirmation.step1Desc: We've sent a detailed itinerary and digital key instructions to your registered email address.
confirmation.step2Desc: Your dedicated host will reach out within 24 hours to arrange any bespoke requests or airport transfers.
confirmation.step3Desc: On the day of your arrival, your digital key will activate automatically in the ZIGGLA app at 3:00 PM.
confirmation.verifyingSubtitle: Hold on while we confirm with your bank.
confirmation.pendingSubtitle: Your bank is taking longer than usual. We'll email you the moment it's confirmed — no need to refresh.
confirmation.failedSubtitle: Your card was declined or you cancelled the payment. No charge has been made.
confirmation.notFoundSubtitle: We couldn't find this reference. It may have been cancelled or never completed.
confirmation.confirmedSubtitle: Your stay is locked in. We've emailed your receipt with all the details.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Inquiries & Support
contact.intro: Our concierge team is dedicated to curating your perfect stay. Whether you seek a private viewing or have a question, we are at your service.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can assist your stay...
contact.successMessage: Message sent. We'll get back to you shortly. Check your inbox for a confirmation.
contact.errorRequired: Please fill in your name, email and message.
contact.tourDesc: Our agents are available for evening and weekend viewings upon request.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1p1: Welcome to ZIGGLA. These Terms of Service constitute a legally binding agreement made between you, whether personally or on behalf of an entity, and ZIGGLA concerning your access to and use of our premium property management and concierge services.
terms.s1p2: By accessing our portfolio or making a reservation, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by all of these terms. Our services are exclusively curated for discerning clients who value privacy, excellence, and the standard of luxury living we represent.
terms.s2intro: All reservations at ZIGGLA properties are subject to availability and formal verification. To maintain the exclusivity of our collection, we implement a multi-stage booking process:
terms.s2b1: Identity verification is required for all residential stays.
terms.s2b2: A non-refundable concierge initiation fee may be applied to bespoke requests.
terms.s2b3: We accept major credit cards, bank wire transfers for high-value transactions.
terms.s3intro: Guests are expected to maintain the integrity and tranquility of our estates. This includes but is not limited to:
terms.s3b1: Adherence to local noise ordinances and community guidelines within luxury residential complexes.
terms.s3b2: Prohibition of unauthorized professional photography or videography for commercial purposes without prior written consent.
terms.s3b3: Full liability for any structural or aesthetic damage to the property's curated furniture and art collections.
terms.s4intro: Given the high-demand nature of our curated canvas, our cancellation policy is designed to protect property owners and our service standards:
terms.s4standardText: Cancellations made 14 days prior to arrival receive a 50% refund. Inside 14 days, no refund is available.
terms.s4signatureText: Seasonal and annual leases carry bespoke termination clauses as outlined in individual lease documents.
terms.s5quote: ZIGGLA provides luxury housing as-is. We do not assume liability for external environmental factors, third-party concierge failures, or personal belongings lost within the properties.
terms.s5p: To the maximum extent permitted by law, ZIGGLA and its affiliates shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from the use of our digital platforms or the physical occupation of our managed assets.
terms.s6p: These terms shall be governed by and defined following the laws of the jurisdiction where the specific property is located. ZIGGLA and yourself irrevocably consent that the courts of said jurisdiction shall have exclusive jurisdiction to resolve any dispute which may arise in connection with these terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At ZIGGLA, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we handle your personal information.
privacy.collectText: We may collect Identity Data (name, username), Contact Data (address, email, phone), Financial Data (payment details), and Transaction Data (booking history).
privacy.useText: We use your data to perform our booking contract, for our legitimate business interests, and to comply with legal obligations.
privacy.securityText: We have appropriate security measures to prevent your personal data from being lost, misused or accessed unauthorised. We will notify you of any breach where legally required.
privacy.rightsText: You have the right to access, correct, erase, or transfer your personal data. You may also object to or restrict processing.
privacy.cookiesText: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience. You can control cookie settings in your browser, though some features may not function without them.
privacy.contactText: For privacy questions, contact us at:
